name: Half-Time Beef Sandwiches
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle lemon juice over apple.
2. Combine cream cheese, milk and horseradish in a bowl.
3. Stir in the chopped apple and walnut pieces until well mixed.
4. Spread an equal amount of the cream cheese mixture on the cut sides of each roll half.
5. Place lettuce leaves, beef slices, and green onions on top of one third of each roll.
6. Cover with the remaining roll halves.
